testcase.name: testUpdateCourseValidationAndSuccess

testcase.name: testAddCourseSuccessAndDuplicateCodeFailure
testcase.system-err: Error creating course: [SQLITE_CONSTRAINT_UNIQUE] A UNIQUE constraint failed (UNIQUE constraint failed: courses.course_code)
